name: Bean Curd on Sizzling Platter
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried lily flowers, loosely packed
2 tsp Vegetarian oyster sauce (Lee Kum Kee)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place lily flowers and agaric in a small bowl and cover with warm water. Soak for 30 minutes, drain, and set aside.
2. Slice tofu into 1/4 inch thick strips. Heat soybean oil in a wok or large skillet and stir-fry tofu until brown and crispy. Remove and set aside.
3. Heat sesame oil in the wok over medium-high heat and stir-fry lily flowers, agaric, shiitake mushrooms, and carrot for 2 minutes.
4. Add tofu, vegetable stock, soy sauce, sugar, white pepper, and oyster sauce to the vegetable mixture. Lower heat and cook for 3 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch with water until blended. Stir the cornstarch solution into the vegetable mixture and heat for 2 minutes.
6. Serve hot. (Optional: Heat a sizzling platter over high heat. Once heated, place vegetables on the platter and serve immediately).
